title: privacy: Hardcoded maintainer absolute paths in tracked files break on other machines and leak the home path.
description:
[P2 · privacy · audit] Hardcoded maintainer absolute paths in tracked files break on other machines and leak the home path.

Evidence: keel/project.json:5 path='/Users/luke/dev/onlytools/sentinel'; src/__tests__/doctor/check.test.ts:38 'node /Users/luke/dev/sentinel/dist/cli/index.js ...'.

Fix: Make keel/project.json path repo-relative or regenerate on clone; change the test fixture string to a generic placeholder path.

Source: launch-readiness audit 2026-06-18
